author: y4rr
content: Decision: dev-dependencies for ferrotorch-train conformance tests. ferrotorch-core uses serde_json + serde + toml in dev-deps. ferrotorch-train currently has empty [dev-dependencies]. Will add serde_json + serde + toml as dev-deps to support fixture JSON loading and TOML surface inventory parsing. This is adding only to [dev-dependencies], not [dependencies], so it does NOT change the crate's published interface — no workspace dep changes needed since serde_json, serde, and toml are already in the workspace. Constraint met: no workspace dep changes (only consuming existing workspace entries from dev context).
